entities.name: V
entities.context: The person whose knowledge system is being analyzed; also referred to as Vrijen

entities.name: Conversation
entities.context: A content type in the knowledge system with format conversation:<convo-id>

entities.name: Article
entities.context: A content type in the knowledge system with format article:<title-or-id>

entities.name: Position Candidates
entities.context: Compound insights representing worldview claims extracted from conversations

entities.name: Assertions with reasoning
entities.context: Type of position candidate: X is true because Y and Z

entities.name: Strategic beliefs
entities.context: Type of position candidate: The way to win is by doing X

entities.name: Market observations
entities.context: Type of position candidate: Industry changes and dynamics

entities.name: Philosophical stances
entities.context: Type of position candidate: Personal beliefs and worldview claims

entities.name: N5
entities.context: The knowledge system framework being described

entities.name: Knowledge/positions/
entities.context: Storage location for crystallized positions in the N5 system

relationships.context: V uses the N5 knowledge system framework
Assertions with reasoning are a type of position candidate
Strategic beliefs are a type of position candidate
Market observations are a type of position candidate
Philosophical stances are a type of position candidate
Conversations are analyzed to identify position candidates
Articles are analyzed to identify position candidates
